summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Import/Export functionality for BNI Prezenta App. All backend API tests (13/13) and frontend UI tests passed successfully. Export downloads JSON file with versioned data, Import accepts JSON files and shows appropriate success/error messages.
passed_tests: Backend - Export contains all required fields (version, export_date, app_name, data, counts)
Backend - Export counts match actual data array lengths
Backend - POST /api/import accepts valid JSON data
Backend - Import returns correct imported/updated counts
Backend - Import updates existing records instead of duplicating
Backend - Import handles attendance data correctly
Backend - Import handles guests data correctly
Frontend - Export button triggers JSON file download
Frontend - Downloaded file has correct naming format (bni-prezenta-export-YYYY-MM-DD.json)
Frontend - Success message displays after export with counts
Frontend - Import button opens file picker
Frontend - File input accepts .json files only
Frontend - Import shows success message with detailed counts
Frontend - Import shows error message for invalid JSON files
seed_data_creation: Created test import data with TEST_ prefixed member IDs for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Import/Export functionality is fully working. Backend endpoints /api/export and /api/import are properly authenticated and return correct data structures. Frontend UI in Settings page has blue Export button and green Import button with proper data-testid attributes. Success/error messages display correctly in Romanian.
